exceptions.reason: The <button> only renders when removable() is true (@if (removable()) { <button>...</button> }). Without it -- the common case -- arena-tag is a plain tone dot and projected content, no button, no role and no interactivity at all, and this whole pattern does not apply; it would bind none instead. This binding, and every exception in it including the one below, describes arena-tag only in the shape it takes when removable is set.

The remove button has no disabled concept at all -- aria-disabled is never set, and there is no input to make removal unavailable while still visible. It is either rendered (fully enabled) or not rendered at all.
